ops.title: GAP-2: corrections-modality mining pass over transcripts
ops.description: The AUDIT-PLF-2026-07 mining ran on one modality (Bash-command shapes + regex grep) because released cc-transcript@0.9.0 lacks the commands/permissions/corrections subcommands (dev checkout has them; papercut filed 2026-07-22). Once cc-transcript releases them (or via `uv run` from ~/Code/cc-transcript), mine the user-correction/interruption turns for lifecycle friction the command-shape modality missed, excluding marker AUDIT-PLF-2026-07 and session d30071c4-4607-47a2-abf5-149cd7f2d40f.

ops.text: corrections/permissions modalities queried over the full corpus
findings merged into the friction catalog with the audit marker excluded
